case_title: THE CITY TOW VS KIRSCH, GERALD

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-19-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF OCT-15-1997 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRSCH, GERALD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
